ddt:Target.Name: CLUSTER_L43_ V1.72
ddt:Target.Description:
Status : V1.72 Modifier : Y.S.HWANG Modified : 30/03/2012 Correction : Correction by DDT script V1.5
Status : V1.71 Modifier : Y.S.HWANG Modified : 20/02/2012 Correction : DID error correction
Modified : 19/01/2012 Correction : ECO (2227xx -> 2204xx) Correction : ECO Monitoring 23 -> 1B, BSW 24 -> 3B
Modified : 28/11/2011 Add DTC BSW($D500)
Modified : 21/11/2011 Modify DID ECO Monitoring 23 -> 1B Modify DID BSW 24 -> 3B
Modified : 28/10/2011 Add Russian or Korean Language in the screen
Status : Non-official V1.6 Modified : 25/08/2011 Modifier : Y.S.HWANG CdC Diag : CdC_Diag_CLUSTER_X91&L43_V1.5.doc
V1.5 : CdC Diag : L43K_PH2_Diagnostic specification_V1.0.doc
V1.4 : Pointer Animation config. Stop and Start Config : only for X91 DTC number added. - DTC Data input at DTCDeviceIdentifier
V1.3 : LBackup Liter 0 point position change Data Monitor adjust DTC name translation : French to English
V1.2 : Data Monitor adjust
V1.1 : Error Correction. ( Database check ) Add LBackup information Error Correction. ( Database checked by J.H. Park ) DID error Correction
V1.0 : Add Read/Write : MPU_Easy access

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: OutputControlCommand
Data.Comment: Commande de test : Paramètre de pilotage

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: Commande de test : Liste des commandes

Data.Name: OutputControlStatus
Data.Comment: Commande de test

Item.Text: Parking Braking working, No smart card

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Comment: Numero de calibration en Hexa

Data.Name: DiagnosticIdentificationCode
Data.Comment: Diag evolution number

Data.Name: SoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software identification number

Data.Name: SupplierNumber.ITG
Data.Comment: Supplier ITG code

Data.Name: EditionNumber
Data.Comment: Software version(edition) number

Data.Name: Producteur MUX Systeme anti roulis compteur
Producteur MUX Tabbeau de bord compteur
ClusterProductionDate _ ASCII
Data.Comment: numéro de série unique du tdb

Data.Name: ClusterProductionNumber _ ASCII
Data.Comment: numéro de série unique du tdb

Data.Name: Producteur MUX Boitier auto ecole compteur
Producteur MUX Controle electrique couple compteur
Producteur MUX Onduleur _ vehicule electrique compteur
Config Generale_Presence ESP
Data.Comment: Presence ESP / VSU ou ABS

Data.Name: Config Generale_Presence LBCS
Data.Comment: Presence LBCS

Item.Text: No Config MPU Day Running Light
With Config MPU Day Running Light
No Config MPU Single Door Opening
With Config MPU Single Door Opening

Data.Name: Config Generale_Type of Fuel Consumption
Data.Comment: Type d'afficheur ADAC

Data.Name: Config Gauge_Correction ADAC
Data.Comment: Potentiomètre pour info carburant consommé

Data.Name: Config Gauge_Threshold.Max level
Data.Comment: Seuil haut L1 pour stratégie de jaugeage

Data.Name: Config Gauge_Threshold.Min level
Data.Comment: Seuil Bas L1 pour stratégie de jaugeage

Data.Name: Config Gauge_Fuel level and R.F_R _ R10
Config Gauge_Fuel level and R.F_R _ R1
Config Gauge_Fuel level and R.F_R _ R2
Config Gauge_Fuel level and R.F_R _ R3
Config Gauge_Fuel level and R.F_R _ R4
Config Gauge_Fuel level and R.F_R _ R5
Config Gauge_Fuel level and R.F_R _ R6
Config Gauge_Fuel level and R.F_R _ R7
Config Gauge_Fuel level and R.F_R _ R8
Config Gauge_Fuel level and R.F_R _ R9
Wire Input_Fuel Level L0
Data.Comment: Tension batterie lors de la mesure de la jauge carburant

Data.Name: Wire Input_Engine Oil.Mesure Oil Level U1
Data.Comment: 1ere mesure de tension NH

Data.Name: Wire Input_Engine Oil.Battery U1
Data.Comment: Tension batterie pendant la 1ère mesure du niveau d'huile

Data.Name: Wire Input_Engine Oil.Mesure Oil Level U2
Data.Comment: 2eme mesure de tension NH

Data.Name: Wire Input_Engine Oil.Battery U2
Data.Comment: Tension batterie pendant la 2ème mesure du niveau d'huile

Data.Name: Wire Input_Engine Oil.Mesure Delta U
Data.Comment: Delta de tension de sonde NH entre t1 et t2

Item.Text: L2 is initialize with normal APC on.
L2 is initialized with L2enAPC threshold
L2 is initialized with L2off threshold
L2 is initialized with L3 threshold then
L2 is initialized with diag service
If L2 is updated after injection failure exit
L2 is updated after Fuel Gauge failure exit
L2 is in Missing Injection Frame Mode
L2 is in Fuel Gauge Failure Mode
L2 is initialized with Flag Memo

Data.Name: Status System_number intended resets
Data.Comment: Nombre de reset a froid

Data.Name: Status System_number resets by failures
Data.Comment: Nombre de reset a chaud

Item.Text: Measure done due to time since last APC < 1 mn
Battery voltage too low to make measurement
Measurement impossible because sensor in CO
Measurement impossible because sensor in CC
No Measurement,sensor out of range (3-20 ohms)
No memorised failure : Fuel Gauge CO
No Current Failure : Fuel Gauge CO
No Memorized Failure : Fuel Gauge CC
No Current Failure : Fuel Gauge CC
No Memorized Failure : Missing frame MMI_ECM
No Current Failure : Missing frame MMI_ECM

Data.Name: Config Entretien_Odo Update.Updated by ABS
Data.Comment: Nombre de mise à jour de l'odomètre général TdB/ABS

Data.Name: Config Entretien_Oil Draining init.Oil Change distance
Data.Comment: Valeur initiale autonomie de vidange en unite distance selectionnee

Data.Name: Config Entretien_Oil Draining init.Oil Change Duration
Data.Comment: Valeur initiale Temps entre 2 vidanges

Data.Name: Wire Input_Incident Brake oil.Brake oil Error
Wire Input_Incident Brake oil.Brake oill Voltage
Config Entretien_Oil Draining count.Oil Change distance
Data.Comment: Valeur courante restante autonomie vidange en unité distance sélectionnée

Data.Name: Config Entretien_Oil Draining count.Oil Change Duration
Data.Comment: Valeur courante restante autonomie vidange temps

Data.Name: Config Entretien_Odo Update.Restet by DIAG
Data.Comment: Nombre de RAZ de l'odometre general

Data.Name: Config Gauge_Fuel level and R.F_R _ R0
Config Generale_Presence Auto Rear Wiper
Data.Comment: Presence Essuyage automatique

Data.Name: Config Generale_Presence UPA
Data.Comment: Presence AAP

Data.Name: Config Generale_Presence Pointer Animation
Data.Comment: Presence Pointer Animation

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: OutputControl.Start.Voyants
Request.Comment: Demande l'allumage de tous les temoins

Request.Name: OutputControl.Status.Voyants
Request.Comment: Demande l'allumage de tous les temoins

Request.Name: OutputControl.Stop.Voyants
Request.Comment: Demande l'allumage de tous les temoins

Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Test.Description: Lost Communication With Body Control Module (BCM)
Lost Communication With Restrains Control Modul (AIRBAG)
Surveillance Paramètre CAN reçu invalide de l'ABS/ESP : vitesse véhicule

Label.Text: This service indicates the last two causes of switching on for SERVICE, STOP or REF telltales.
Alert number reference is indicated into the "BUIC".
